languages.text:
The wielder of this staff (power level 7) gains the {g|f:8a759cdc2b754309b1fb75397798fbf1}Inferno{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g}. The ability is also available in its {g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}heroic act{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:DesperateMeasure}desperate measure{/g} versions. Power level affects the {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} of this power.
<indent=5%>+10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}</indent>
languages.original_text:
Обладатель посоха (уровень 7) получает {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g} {g|f:8a759cdc2b754309b1fb75397798fbf1}Инферно{/g}. Также варианты этой способности доступны в качестве {g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}героического акта{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:DesperateMeasure}отчаянных мер{/g}. Значение {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g} от этой силы зависит от уровня посоха.
<indent=5%>+10 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воле{/g}</indent>

traits.locale_text: 这根法杖（力量等级7）的使用者获得地狱烈焰{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}。这个能力既可以作为{g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}英雄壮举{/g}使用，也可以作为{g|Encyclopedia:DesperateMeasure}背水一战{/g}使用。力量等级会影响此能力造成的伤害。 +10{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}

languages.text: この杖の使用者（パワーレベル7）は灼炎{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}を獲得する。このアビリティは{g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}英雄的行為{/g}中および{g|Encyclopedia:DesperateMeasure}非常手段{/g}においても使用可能である。パワーレベルはこのパワーの{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}に影響を及ぼす。 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g}が+10増加

languages.text:

Des versions {g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}Acte héroïque{/g} et {g|Encyclopedia:DesperateMeasure}Mesure désespérée{/g} de cette capacité sont également disponibles. Les {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} infligés dépendent du niveau de puissance.

Bu asayı (güç seviyesi 7) kullanan kişi, {g|f:8a759cdc2b754309b1fb75397798fbf1}İnferno{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyetini{/g} kazanır. Bu kabiliyetin ayrıca {g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}kahramanca eylem{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:DesperateMeasure}son çare önlem{/g} hâlleri de mevcuttur. Güç seviyesi, bu gücün vereceği {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasara{/g} da etki eder.
<indent=5%>+10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g}</indent>
